comment: Stream a model reply into Telegram. transport=auto uses sendMessageDraft in private chats and falls back to editMessageText elsewhere; pass done=true on the final call to send the real persisted message. The bot token is read from CORAX_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, never passed in input.

input.text: Here is the answer so far with **bold** that renders cleanly
input.last_sent_text: Here is the answer so far
